FD1.title: High Internship Readiness
FD1.summary: The student is strongly prepared across the major internship preparation areas.
FD1.recommendation: Apply actively and prepare for company-specific interviews.

zh.title: 高实习准备度
zh.summary: 学生在主要实习准备领域表现较强。
zh.recommendation: 积极申请，并准备针对不同公司的面试回答。
next_steps: 持续更新作品集和简历

ms.title: Kesediaan Latihan Industri Tinggi
ms.summary: Pelajar bersedia dengan baik dalam kebanyakan bidang persediaan latihan industri.
ms.recommendation: Mohon secara aktif dan bersedia untuk temu duga khusus syarikat.

FD2.title: Medium Internship Readiness
FD2.summary: The student has useful preparation signals but still has important gaps.
FD2.recommendation: Apply selectively while closing the weakest preparation areas.

zh.title: 中等实习准备度
zh.summary: 学生已有一些有效准备，但仍存在重要差距。
zh.recommendation: 可以选择性申请，同时补强最弱的准备领域。

ms.title: Kesediaan Latihan Industri Sederhana
ms.summary: Pelajar mempunyai beberapa tanda persediaan yang baik tetapi masih ada jurang penting.
ms.recommendation: Mohon secara terpilih sambil memperbaiki bidang yang paling lemah.

FD3.title: Low Internship Readiness
FD3.summary: The student is not ready to apply widely because several major preparation areas are missing.
FD3.recommendation: Build the basic resume, project evidence, technical foundation, and role clarity first.
next_steps: Build at least one related project

zh.title: 低实习准备度
zh.summary: 学生暂时不适合广泛申请，因为多个关键准备领域缺失。
zh.recommendation: 先建立简历、项目证据、技术基础和岗位方向。
next_steps: 完成至少一个相关项目
准备 GitHub 或作品集

ms.title: Kesediaan Latihan Industri Rendah
ms.summary: Pelajar belum sesuai memohon secara meluas kerana beberapa bidang utama belum lengkap.
ms.recommendation: Bina resume asas, bukti projek, asas teknikal, dan hala tuju peranan terlebih dahulu.

FD4.title: Ready to Apply Now
FD4.summary: The student has strong readiness indicators and an active application process.
FD4.recommendation: Continue applications and prepare for interview follow-ups.
next_steps: Follow up and record application status

FD5.title: Need to Improve Technical Preparation First
FD5.summary: Technical readiness is the main blocker.
FD5.recommendation: Strengthen programming basics, role-related concepts, and problem-solving practice.
next_steps: Practice Python, Java, or SQL basics

FD6.title: Need to Improve Application Materials First
FD6.summary: Resume or supporting application materials are not strong enough yet.
FD6.recommendation: Prepare a complete resume, supporting documents, and professional profile.
next_steps: Prepare cover letter and academic documents

FD7.title: Need Interview Preparation Before Applying
FD7.summary: The student needs more interview practice before attending interviews.
FD7.recommendation: Practice technical, behavioral, and self-introduction questions.

FD8.title: Need to Clarify Target Role First
FD8.summary: Career direction is unclear, making preparation less focused.
FD8.recommendation: Choose a target internship role and study job descriptions before refining resume and projects.
next_steps: Update resume and project plan for that role

FD9.title: Need to Improve Project Explanation
FD9.summary: The student has project evidence but cannot explain it clearly enough yet.
FD9.recommendation: Practice explaining project goals, technical implementation, challenges, and results.

FD10.title: Need to Improve Application Progress
FD10.summary: The student should increase applications and manage the application process more systematically.
FD10.recommendation: Build a weekly application routine, review job descriptions before applying, and track follow-up actions clearly.
next_steps: Send polite follow-up emails when appropriate

zh.title: 需要提升申请进度
zh.summary: 学生需要增加申请数量，并更系统地管理申请流程。
zh.recommendation: 建立每周申请节奏，在申请前先看岗位描述，并清楚记录后续跟进。
next_steps: 在合适的时候发送礼貌的跟进邮件
申请前先查看岗位描述

ms.title: Perlu Tingkatkan Kemajuan Permohonan
ms.summary: Pelajar perlu menambah jumlah permohonan dan mengurus proses permohonan dengan lebih sistematik.
ms.recommendation: Bina rutin permohonan mingguan, semak penerangan kerja sebelum memohon, dan rekod tindakan susulan dengan jelas.
next_steps: Mula memohon kepada syarikat yang sesuai
Hantar e-mel susulan yang sopan apabila sesuai
